articles.author: Jill Lawless
articles.title: Starmer pledges to bring Britain closer to the EU as he faces calls to step down - AP News
articles.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer has pledged to bring Britain closer to the European Union as he faces calls to step down after poor local election results for his Labour Party. Starmer said Monday he would prove his doubters wrong, tackle big challenges and resto…
articles.content: LONDON (AP) British Prime Minister Keir Starmer pledged Monday to prove the doubters in his own party and among the electorate as a whole wrong as he tries to fight off demands to step down after dev… [+5183 chars]
